name: Video - Maximum Discount Rules
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video we show you how the Maximum Discount Rules apply within POS. For example, if a staff member tries to discount a product beyond the maximum discount rule an alert will be displayed. If required, staff members can be configured with permissions to override the maximum discount rule e.g. Store Managers."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For more information on configuring Max Discount Rules refer to the Maximum Discount Rules article."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79163119?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79163119?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}]
